title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono argues that humans cannot compete with AI on raw knowledge accumulation, and that true intelligence in the age of AI is defined by curiosity, human judgment, and the capacity for discovery rather than knowledge retention. He draws on the example of Ramanujan to illustrate how unconventional thinking and individual genius often emerge outside traditional systems.
